title: Dial-Up Internet Guide
text:
## Dial-Up Internet Guide

Welcome to the Internet!

**Step 1:** Tell everyone in the house you will {verb} the phone line for {number} hours.

**Step 2:** Connect your {adjective} modem and listen for the {adjective} sound of progress.

**Step 3:** Choose a {adjective} username like {person} and a password no one can {verb}.

**Step 4:** Download one {adjective} image very {adverb}.

**Step 5:** Sign into chat and say hello to {number} strangers.

**Step 6:** When a parent needs the phone, {verb} quickly and blame the {object}.

Repeat until broadband arrives in {number} years.
